items.title: Earnings live: UnitedHealth stock falls 19%, American Airlines slides, Texas Instruments pops, Logitech edges higher
items.description: The fourth quarter earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with Big Tech results from Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, and Apple headlining the earnings calendar.

items.title: Caterpillar is Set to Report Q4 Earnings: Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
items.description: CAT's Q4 earnings are set to decline for the sixth straight quarter, with weaker pricing and higher costs pressuring results despite higher volumes.

items.title: Earnings live: UnitedHealth stock tumbles, UPS and General Motors rise
items.description: The fourth quarter earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with Big Tech results from Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, and Apple headlining the earnings calendar.

items.title: Jefferies Maintains Buy on Caterpillar, Raises Price Target to $750
items.description: Jefferies  analyst Stephen Volkmann   maintains Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $700 to $750.
